testcase.name: test_super_admin_login

failure.message: AssertionError: No access_token in response assert 'access_token' in {'token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjoidXNlcl9mNDdlYjEyYTdlNjYiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImtpbmdzbGV5QHZhc2lsaXNuZXRzaGllbGQuY29tIiwicm9sZSI6InN1cGVyX2FkbWluIiwidHlwZSI6ImFjY2VzcyIsImV4cCI6MTc3MTU3MDk0OH0.WUGW_cWMmESg6AKDS_EJMSO9U9fnonJX_EdAm4cqMQw', 'user': {'created_at': '2026-02-17T10:18:19.575152Z', 'email': 'kingsley@vasilisnetshield.com', 'name': 'KINGSLEY IHESIENE', 'organization_id': None, ...}}

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration10_features.py:35: in test_super_admin_login assert "access_token" in data, "No access_token in response" E AssertionError: No access_token in response E assert 'access_token' in {'token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjoidXNlcl9mNDdlYjEyYTdlNjYiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImtpbmdzbGV5QHZhc2lsaXNuZXRzaGllbGQuY29tIiwicm9sZSI6InN1cGVyX2FkbWluIiwidHlwZSI6ImFjY2VzcyIsImV4cCI6MTc3MTU3MDk0OH0.WUGW_cWMmESg6AKDS_EJMSO9U9fnonJX_EdAm4cqMQw', 'user': {'created_at': '2026-02-17T10:18:19.575152Z', 'email': 'kingsley@vasilisnetshield.com', 'name': 'KINGSLEY IHESIENE', 'organization_id': None, ...}}

testcase.name: test_phishing_stats_returns_data
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration10_features.py:69: in test_phishing_stats_returns_data assert response.status_code == 200, f"Stats request failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Stats request failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration10_features.py:93: in test_phishing_stats_with_days_filter assert response.status_code == 200, f"Stats with days filter failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Stats with days filter failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
